hooks.command: PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${ANTIGRAVITY_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${GEMINI_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}}"; if [ -z "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] || [ ! -f "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/skyline-enforce.sh" ]; then printf '{"decision":"allow"}\n'; exit 0; fi; sh "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/skyline-enforce.sh" bash

PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${ANTIGRAVITY_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${GEMINI_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}}"; if [ -z "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] || [ ! -f "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/skyline-enforce.sh" ]; then printf '{"decision":"allow"}\n'; exit 0; fi; sh "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/skyline-enforce.sh" read

PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${ANTIGRAVITY_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${GEMINI_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}}"; if [ -z "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] || [ ! -f "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/skyline-enforce.sh" ]; then printf '{"decision":"allow"}\n'; exit 0; fi; sh "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/skyline-enforce.sh" edit
